description: Style NoteThis summer is the season for fusion and prints, and creations by mineral embody these warm weather trends. These pieces are perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without loosing her cool. Product DescriptionCream floral printed skirt with floral print, pink waistband, grey printed band with pink piping at hem, concealed zipper and button closure on left, inner liningMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
